summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 new features: Product Catalog CRUD, Public Listino page, Public Landing page with contact form, and 3MF import. All 20 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend UI elements verified working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/products requires authentication (401)
GET /api/products returns user's products list
POST /api/products creates a product with name, price, category, materials, is_public
POST /api/products with base64 photo stores photo correctly
PUT /api/products/{id} updates a product
DELETE /api/products/{id} deletes a product
GET /api/public/listino returns public products without auth
GET /api/public/listino only shows products with is_public=True
GET /api/public/landing returns landing page data without auth
POST /api/public/contact sends contact form without auth
POST /api/public/contact validates required fields (422 on missing)
GET /api/admin/landing-settings requires admin auth
GET /api/admin/landing-settings returns landing config
PUT /api/admin/landing-settings updates hero_title, about_text, services, contact info, social links
GET /api/admin/contact-requests requires admin auth
GET /api/admin/contact-requests returns contact requests list
POST /api/import/3mf requires authentication
POST /api/import/3mf rejects non-.3mf files (400)
POST /api/import/3mf parses valid .3mf file and returns time/filament data
POST /api/import/3mf handles multiple plates (sums time and filament)
Catalog page (/catalog) shows products grid with photo, name, price, category, public badge
Catalog page has Add Product dialog with photo upload, public toggle
Catalog page has 'Vedi Listino' button to open public listino
Public Listino page (/listino) loads without login, shows products with category filter buttons
Landing page (/landing) loads without login, shows hero, about, services, portfolio, contact form
Landing page contact form submits and shows success message 'Messaggio inviato!'
Calculator page (/calculator) has 'Importa .3mf' button
Admin panel has Landing tab with hero_title, hero_subtitle, about_text, services, contact_email, contact_phone, social links
Admin panel has Preventivi tab showing contact requests
Sidebar has 'Catalogo' link
seed_data_creation: Created test products and contact requests during testing (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Four new features fully implemented and tested: 1) Product Catalog - CRUD at /api/products with photo upload (base64), is_public toggle. Catalog page at /catalog shows products grid with edit/delete. 2) Public Listino - GET /api/public/listino returns only is_public=True products. Page at /listino with category filters. 3) Public Landing - GET /api/public/landing returns hero, about, services, portfolio (public products). Contact form at POST /api/public/contact. Admin configures via /api/admin/landing-settings. Contact requests visible at /api/admin/contact-requests. 4) 3MF Import - POST /api/import/3mf parses Bambu Studio .3mf files (ZIP with Metadata/plate_*.json), extracts prediction (time) and filament[].used_g. Calculator page has 'Importa .3mf' button.

product_catalog.api_crud: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/products - full CRUD with photo upload
product_catalog.public_toggle: is_public field controls visibility in public listino
product_catalog.ui_page: /catalog page with product grid, Add/Edit/Delete dialogs

public_listino.api: GET /api/public/listino - no auth required, returns only public products
public_listino.brand_integration: Shows brand_name and primary_color from site settings

public_landing.api_landing: GET /api/public/landing - no auth, returns hero, about, services, portfolio
public_landing.api_contact: POST /api/public/contact - no auth, stores contact request
public_landing.ui_page: /landing page with hero, about, services, portfolio, contact form
public_landing.contact_form: Form submits and shows 'Messaggio inviato!' success message

3mf_import.api: POST /api/import/3mf - parses .3mf ZIP, extracts time and filament from plate JSON

admin_panel_tabs.landing_tab: Landing tab with hero_title, hero_subtitle, about_text, services list, contact info, social links
admin_panel_tabs.preventivi_tab: Preventivi tab showing contact requests with name, email, phone, message, timestamp

mocked_apis.email_sending: REAL - SMTP configured with Aruba (smtps.aruba.it). Contact form emails are actually sent to admin.
